caption: A woman wearing a striped button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones is centered in the shot, appearing to be in a video call. She is positioned in a room with a light-colored wall and a light-green curtain to her left. To her right, the edge of a light-colored piece of furniture is visible. The on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom-left corner of each shot. As the sequence progresses, the woman is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements shift subtly as she talks. She maintains a steady gaze toward the camera, and her posture remains consistent throughout the clip. The lighting is soft and even, and there are no other people or significant objects present in the scene.
